subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath made acquisition and labor the treasure of man, and hath ordained for every soul that which His knowledge had foreordained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی جعل کنز الانسان الکسب و الاقتراف و قدر لکلنفس ما سبق به علمه
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
